inputs.label: Horizontal Distance
inputs.businessContext: The horizontal run of the slope.

businessContext_i18n.en: The horizontal run of the slope.

inputs.label: Vertical Rise
inputs.businessContext: The vertical height gained along the slope.

businessContext_i18n.en: The vertical height gained along the slope.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die vertikale Höhe entlang des Hangs.

inputs.label: Angle (optional)
inputs.businessContext: Known angle of the slope; set to 0 to compute from rise/run.

businessContext_i18n.en: Known angle of the slope; set to 0 to compute from rise/run.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğimin bilinen açısı; yükselme/mesafeden hesaplamak için 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bekannter Neigungswinkel der Rampe; auf 0 setzen, um aus Höhe/Länge zu berechnen.

inputs.label: Slope Length (optional)
inputs.businessContext: Known length of the slope (hypotenuse); set to 0 to compute from rise/run.

businessContext_i18n.en: Known length of the slope (hypotenuse); set to 0 to compute from rise/run.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğimin bilinen uzunluğu (hipotenüs); yükselme/mesafeden hesaplamak için 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bekannte Länge der Rampe (Hypotenuse); auf 0 setzen, um aus Höhe/Länge zu berechnen.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
